'''zabumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:khakhlushka|khakhlushka]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-b-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:khakhlushka|khakhlushka]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zabumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæbimith|zæbimith]] || [[word:zæbimij|zæbimij]] || [[word:zæbimish|zæbimish]] || [[word:zæbimi|zæbimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zabubumuth|zabubumuth]] || [[word:zabubumuj|zabubumuj]] || [[word:zabubumush|zabubumush]] || [[word:zabubumu|zabubumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zabumuth|zabumuth]] || [[word:zabumuj|zabumuj]] || [[word:zabumush|zabumush]] || [[word:zabumu|zabumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zabufmuth|zabufmuth]] || [[word:zabufmuj|zabufmuj]] || [[word:zabufmush|zabufmush]] || [[word:zabufmuf|zabufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zabumuthu|zabumuthu]] || [[word:zabumuju|zabumuju]] || [[word:zabumushu|zabumushu]] || [[word:zabumuku|zabumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zabumuth|zabumuth]] || [[word:zabumuj|zabumuj]] || [[word:zabumush|zabumush]] || [[word:zabumu|zabumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zabumuthul|zabumuthul]] || [[word:zabumujul|zabumujul]] || [[word:zabumushul|zabumushul]] || [[word:zabumukul|zabumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zabumuthuthu|zabumuthuthu]] || [[word:zabumujuju|zabumujuju]] || [[word:zabumushushu|zabumushushu]] || [[word:zabumuku|zabumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zabumuthun|zabumuthun]] || [[word:zabumujun|zabumujun]] || [[word:zabumushun|zabumushun]] || [[word:zabumukun|zabumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zabumuthuoro|zabumuthuoro]] || [[word:zabumujuoro|zabumujuoro]] || [[word:zabumushuoro|zabumushuoro]] || [[word:zabumukuoro|zabumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
